name: 撕合同/展示合同（權力宣示）
description: Tristan展示婚姻合同中的違約金條款，用一紙文書將Ashley從「千金」降為「女傭」，合同成為權力壓迫的物理道具。
tags: 紙質合同的特寫鏡頭，白紙黑字的殘酷條款

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: The complete marriage agreement. A violation penalty of 5 million. You and your mother were so eager for this marriage. Did you not even read the contract before you signed it?
examples.context: 紙質合同的特寫鏡頭，白紙黑字的殘酷條款
